runtime_dependency_policy: QGIS is used only for offline data preparation; FastAPI runtime loads these compact JSONL artifacts.

artifacts.source_notes: Maintained fixture derived from QGIS-reviewed capital-city, major-city, suburb, station, airport, POI, and locality centroids plus aliases for deterministic V2 tests.
artifacts.license_notes: Fixture data for application tests; replace with authoritative source-specific license notes before broad production rollout.
artifacts.generation_notes: Export canonical place records and aliases from QGIS as UTF-8 JSONL with WGS84 latitude/longitude.

artifacts.source_notes: Optional exact origin/destination route cache. Empty in the default fixture so tests exercise the route-network provider path.
artifacts.license_notes: Fixture data for application tests; replace with authoritative route-source license notes before broad production rollout.
artifacts.generation_notes: Export validated route-cache rows from QGIS route layers or reviewed route-distance tables.

artifacts.source_notes: Small maintained fixture of mode-aware local and intercity route-network edges reviewed in QGIS and consumed by the shortest-path provider.
artifacts.license_notes: Fixture data for application tests; replace with authoritative route-network license notes before broad production rollout.
artifacts.generation_notes: Export routable edge rows from QGIS after topology checks; include origin/destination place IDs, mode, distance, confidence, and source version.

artifacts.source_notes: Small QGIS-reviewed road-node fixture for Ticket 15 importer and runtime graph-loading tests.
artifacts.license_notes: Fixture data for application tests; replace with authoritative road-network license notes before broad production rollout.
artifacts.generation_notes: Export road nodes from an offline GIS/routing workflow as WGS84 point features with stable node_id values.

artifacts.source_notes: Small QGIS-reviewed routable road graph with car_ride and rideshare mode coverage, one-way metadata, and a disconnected component.
artifacts.license_notes: Fixture data for application tests; replace with authoritative road-network license notes before broad production rollout.
artifacts.generation_notes: Export road edges from an offline GIS/routing workflow after topology validation; include from/to node IDs, road modes, distance, directionality, source, confidence, and source version.

artifacts.source_notes: Small QGIS-reviewed place-to-road-node snap fixture that connects resolved places to the routable road graph for Ticket 16.
artifacts.license_notes: Fixture data for application tests; replace with authoritative snapping-source license notes before broad production rollout.
artifacts.generation_notes: Export place-to-node snap rows from QGIS after nearest-network review; include place ID, mode, road node ID, snap distance, confidence, source, and source version.

artifacts.source_notes: Maintained Australian state and territory alias mapping used to pass explicit region context into electricity estimates.
artifacts.license_notes: Fixture mapping maintained in-repo; attach authoritative region/factor applicability license notes when upgraded.
artifacts.generation_notes: Export region mapping rows after QGIS spatial joins or manual review of state/grid-region applicability.

open_decisions: Replace fixture place centroids with authoritative locality/station source records and source licenses.
Choose a production route-distance source such as GTFS shapes, OSRM, pgRouting, or a maintained cache.
Decide whether factor_region should map directly to Climatiq regions, local grid factors, or both.
